definition.Comment: Pipeline MS2: S3 Clone -> Orchestrator -> Webhook

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/Users/albertoreginato/Documents/Analysi.serviceRawFile:
service: ms2-analysis-service

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: eu-central-1
  memorySize: 512
  iamRoleStatements:
    # Permesso per scrivere e leggere su S3 (per la Lambda pullRepo)
    - Effect: Allow
      Action:
        - s3:PutObject
        - s3:GetObject
      Resource:
        - !Join ['', [!GetAtt RepositoryBucket.Arn, '/*']]
    # Permesso per il Wrapper NestJS di avviare la Step Function
    - Effect: Allow
      Action:
        - states:StartExecution
      Resource:
        - !Sub "arn:aws:states:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stateMachine:ms2-pipeline-${sls:stage}"
    # Permesso all'Orchestratore di chiamare gli Agenti AI
    - Effect: Allow
      Action:
        - lambda:InvokeFunction
      Resource: "*"
    # Permesso a tutte le lambda di interrogare l'intelligenza artificiale
    - Effect: Allow
      Action:
        - bedrock:InvokeModel
      Resource: "*"

package:
  individually: false
  patterns:
    - '!src/**'
    - '!test/**'
    - '!.github/**'
    - 'dist/**'
    - 'node_modules/**'

build:
  esbuild: false

plugins:
  - serverless-step-functions
  - serverless-offline

functions:
  wrapperAdapter:
    handler: dist/wrapper/handler.startAnalysis
    environment:
      # Passiamo l'ARN dinamico della Step Function al codice NestJS
      STATE_MACHINE_ARN: !Sub "arn:aws:states:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stateMachine:ms2-pipeline-${sls:stage}"
    events:
      - http:
          path: /analyze
          method: post

  pullRepoToS3:
    handler: dist/lambdas/pull-repo.handler
    timeout: 300
    memorySize: 2048
    environment:
      S3_BUCKET_NAME: !Ref RepositoryBucket
    layers:
      - arn:aws:lambda:eu-central-1:553035198032:layer:git-lambda2:8
  
  webhookSender:
    handler: dist/lambdas/webhook.handler
    timeout: 15
  
  orchestrator:
    handler: dist/lambdas/orchestrator.orchestratorHandler
    timeout: 300
    environment:
      LAMBDA_OWASP_NAME: ms2-analysis-service-${sls:stage}-owaspAgent
      LAMBDA_TEST_NAME: ms2-analysis-service-${sls:stage}-testAgent
      LAMBDA_DOCS_NAME: ms2-analysis-service-${sls:stage}-docsAgent

  owaspAgent:
    handler: dist/lambdas/owasp-agent.owaspAgentHandler
    timeout: 300

  testAgent:
    handler: dist/lambdas/test-agent.testAgentHandler
    timeout: 300

  docsAgent:
    handler: dist/lambdas/docs-agent.docAgentHandler
    timeout: 300

# Definizione della Step Function
stepFunctions:
  stateMachines:
    RepoAnalysisStateMachine:
      name: ms2-pipeline-${sls:stage}
      definition: ${file(state-machine.json)} 

# Creazione del Bucket S3
resources:
  Resources:
    RepositoryBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: ms2-analysis-repos-bucket-${sls:stage}-${aws:accountId}
        LifecycleConfiguration:
          Rules:
            - Id: AutoDeleteOldZips
              Status: Enabled
              ExpirationInDays: 1
